conversation.content:
Reconcile the following columns. Document has 14 pages. Sources are anonymous (A and B).

COLUMNS:

---
Column 1: Gleason score - N (%) | ≤ 7 | Treatment
Definition: What number and percentage of participants included in the treatment arm of the clinical trial with a Gleason score of 7 or less? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="211 (33%)" | page=5 | modality=table | reasoning="From Table 1, for Orteronel arm: '< 7' is 46 (7%) and '7' is 165 (26%). Summing these gives 211 (33%)."
  B: value="211 (33%)" | page=5 | modality=table | reasoning="From Table 1 on page 5, for Orteronel arm, Gleason score <7 is 46 (7%) and Gleason score 7 is 165 (26%). Summing these gives 211 (33%)."

---
Column 2: Gleason score - N (%) | ≤ 7 | Control
Definition: What number and percentage of patients with a Gleason score of 7 or less in the control arm of the trial? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="207 (32%)" | page=5 | modality=table | reasoning="From Table 1, for Bicalutamide arm: '< 7' is 39 (6%) and '7' is 168 (26%). Summing these gives 207 (32%)."
  B: value="207 (32%)" | page=5 | modality=table | reasoning="From Table 1 on page 5, for Bicalutamide arm, Gleason score <7 is 39 (6%) and Gleason score 7 is 168 (26%). Summing these gives 207 (32%)."

---
Column 3: Gleason score - N (%) | ≥ 8 | Treatment
Definition: What number and percentage of participants in the treatment arm of the clinical trial with a Gleason score of 8 or higher? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="372 (58%)" | page=5 | modality=table | reasoning="From Table 1, for Orteronel arm: '8' is 123 (19%) and '9-10' is 249 (39%). Summing these gives 372 (58%)."
  B: value="372 (58%)" | page=5 | modality=table | reasoning="From Table 1 on page 5, for Orteronel arm, Gleason score 8 is 123 (19%) and Gleason score 9-10 is 249 (39%). Summing these gives 372 (58%)."

---
Column 4: Gleason score - N (%) | ≥ 8 | Control
Definition: What number and percentage of patients in the control arm of the clinical trial with a Gleason score of 8 or higher? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="382 (60%)" | page=5 | modality=table | reasoning="From Table 1, for Bicalutamide arm: '8' is 118 (19%) and '9-10' is 264 (41%). Summing these gives 382 (60%)."
  B: value="382 (60%)" | page=5 | modality=table | reasoning="From Table 1 on page 5, for Bicalutamide arm, Gleason score 8 is 118 (19%) and Gleason score 9-10 is 264 (41%). Summing these gives 382 (60%)."

---
Column 5: Median PFS (mo) | Overall | Treatment
Definition: What is the median progression free survival (in months) for all patients in the experimental arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="47.6" | page=4 | modality=text | reasoning="The Results section states 'The median PFS in the orteronel group was 47.6 months'. This is also shown in Figure 2."
  B: value="47.6 months" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="From Page 1, 'RESULTS' section: 'The median PFS in the orteronel group was 47.6 months'. Also confirmed in Page 4, 'Secondary End Points' section and Figure 2."

---
Column 6: Median PFS (mo) | Overall | Control
Definition: What is the median progression free survival (in months) for all patients in the control arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="23.0" | page=4 | modality=text | reasoning="The Results section states 'compared with 23.0 months in the control group'. This is also shown in Figure 2."
  B: value="23.0 months" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="From Page 1, 'RESULTS' section: 'compared with 23.0 months, hazard ratio 0.58'. Also confirmed in Page 4, 'Secondary End Points' section and Figure 2."

---
Column 7: Median PFS (mo) | High volume | Treatment
Definition: What is the median progression free survival (in months) for patients with high volume metastasis (by CHAARTED criteria) in the experimental arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="26.4" | page=13 | modality=table | reasoning="From Table A3, for 'Extensive' disease in the 'Orteronel' arm, the 'PFS Orteronel Median/5 Year' is '2.2 years'. Converting to months: 2.2 * 12 = 26.4 months."
  B: value="26.4 months" | page=13 | modality=table | reasoning="From Table A3 on page 13, for 'Extensive' disease group (high volume), 'PFS Orteronel Median/5 Year' is '2.2 years'. Converting to months: 2.2 * 12 = 26.4 months."

---
Column 8: Median PFS (mo) | High volume | Control
Definition: What is the median progression free survival (in months) for patients with high volume metastasis (by CHAARTED criteria) in the control arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="13.2" | page=13 | modality=table | reasoning="From Table A3, for 'Extensive' disease in the 'Control' arm, the 'PFS Control Median/5 Year' is '1.1 years'. Converting to months: 1.1 * 12 = 13.2 months."
  B: value="13.2 months" | page=13 | modality=table | reasoning="From Table A3 on page 13, for 'Extensive' disease group (high volume), 'PFS Control Median/5 Year' is '1.1 years'. Converting to months: 1.1 * 12 = 13.2 months."

---
Column 9: Median PFS (mo) | Low volume | Treatment
Definition: What is the median progression free survival (in months) for patients with low volume metastasis (by CHAARTED criteria) in the experimental arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reached" | page=13 | modality=table | reasoning="From Table A3, for 'Minimal' disease in the 'Orteronel' arm, the 'PFS Orteronel Median/5 Year' is 'NR', indicating Not Reached."
  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="From Table A3 on page 13, for 'Minimal' disease group (low volume), 'PFS Orteronel Median/5 Year' is 'NR' (Not Reached/Not Reported)."

---
Column 10: Median PFS (mo) | Low volume | Control
Definition: What is the median progression free survival (in months) for patients with low volume metastasis (by CHAARTED criteria) in the control arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="43.2" | page=13 | modality=table | reasoning="From Table A3, for 'Minimal' disease in the 'Control' arm, the 'PFS Control Median/5 Year' is '3.6 years'. Converting to months: 3.6 * 12 = 43.2 months."
  B: value="43.2 months" | page=13 | modality=table | reasoning="From Table A3 on page 13, for 'Minimal' disease group (low volume), 'PFS Control Median/5 Year' is '3.6 years'. Converting to months: 3.6 * 12 = 43.2 months."


Submit verification for easy columns first. For disputed columns, use get_page then submit.

[Page 13]
## Page 13

Orteronel for Metastatic Hormone-Sensitive Prostate Cancer



TABLE A3. Treatment Outcomes by Disease Severity
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Disease Group | Control Arm | Orteronel Arm | PFS Control Median/5 Year | PFS Orteronel Median/5 Year | HR (95% CI) | OS Control Median/5 Year | OS Orteronel Median/5 Year | HR (95% CI) |
| Extensive | 313 | 310 | 1.1 years/20% | 2.2 years/29% | 0.66 (0.55 to 0.79) | 4.1 years/44% | 4.8 years/47% | 0.88 (0.71 to 1.10) |
| Minimal | 328 | 328 | 3.6 years/38% | NR/58% | 0.53 (0.42 to 0.66) | NR/71% | NR/71% | 0.89 (0.67 to 1.18) |
Abbreviations: HR, hazard ratio; NR, not reached; OS, overall survival; PFS, progression-free survival.
